medialive.channel.availblanking.CfnAbout:
The configuration of ad avail blanking in the output.

The parent of this entity is EncoderSettings.

medialive.channel.availblanking.AvailBla.Description: The blanking image to be used. Keep empty for solid black. Only .bmp and .png images are supported.

medialive.channel.availblanking.State.Description: When set to enabled, the video, audio, and captions are blanked when insertion metadata is added.
